sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Baillie Gifford Trims Vertex Pharmaceuticals Stake
feed.summary: Baillie Gifford & Co., a major institutional investor, reduced its stake in Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated by 2.9% in the fourth quarter of 2025, selling 5,968 shares. Despite the trim, the firm still holds 201,088 shares valued at approximately $91.17 million. This move is significant as Vertex is a leading biotech firm focused on treatments for serious diseases like cystic fibrosis, and such changes in institutional ownership can reflect market sentiment and future performance expectations.

feed.title: Robeco Institutional Asset Management Trims Altria Group Holdings
feed.summary: Robeco Institutional Asset Management B.V. reduced its stake in Altria Group (NYSE:MO) by 1.7% in the fourth quarter of 2025, selling 13,841 shares. The firm's remaining holding of 782,384 shares was valued at $45.11 million. This move reflects broader shifts in investor sentiment within the tobacco industry, with institutional investors closely monitoring and adjusting their positions in major companies like Altria.

feed.title: Carnival Corp. stock (US1436583006): Is cruise demand recovery strong enough to sustain profit gains
feed.summary: Carnival Corp. stock (US1436583006) leverages its massive fleet to capture market share through increasing demand, offering investors exposure to global travel trends. The company's core business model thrives on high occupancy rates, with bookings surpassing pre-COVID levels, especially in key markets like the U.S. However, high debt levels and economic sensitivity pose risks despite strong analyst views and expected free cash flow improvements.

feed.title: EVRG Maintained by B of A Securities -- Price Target Lowered to $88
feed.summary: B of A Securities has maintained its "Buy" rating for Evergy Inc (EVRG) but slightly lowered its price target from $89.00 to $88.00. Despite strong profitability and growth, GuruFocus data suggests EVRG is significantly overvalued at its current price, with a GF Value™ of $62.94 against a current price of $82.45. Insider activity also shows recent share sales, prompting caution for investors.

feed.title: Raymond James Adjusts SLB Price Target to $58 From $57, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Raymond James has adjusted its price target for SLB N.V. (SLB) stock to $58, an increase from the previous target of $57. The firm maintained its "Outperform" rating on the oilfield services company. This update follows a similar positive revision by RBC, which also raised its price target for SLB to $61 from $54, while also keeping an "Outperform" rating.

feed.title: TER Stock Rises 0.58% in Pre-Market as AI Robotics Momentum Builds
feed.summary: Teradyne (NASDAQ: TER) saw a 0.58% rise in pre-market trading, reaching $370.13 USD, driven by strong momentum in AI-driven robotics and automation, with the stock surging 78.32% year-to-date. Despite stretched valuation multiples, Meyka AI gives TER a B+ grade, indicating a BUY recommendation, while institutional activity shows a mixed but overall confident sentiment. The company's financial performance highlights significant growth in net income and EPS, solidifying its position in the rapidly evolving AI and robotics sectors.

feed.title: News | Roundtable debate: The rise and rise of self-storage as an asset class
feed.summary: A recent roundtable discussion hosted by Martin's Properties and CoStar News highlighted the transformation of self-storage into a mature, institutional-grade alternative real estate asset class. Investors, operators, and advisors explored the reasons behind institutional capital pouring into the sector, including diversification needs, impressive rental growth, and resilient cash flows. Despite a slight lull in transaction volumes in 2025, the sector is poised for continued expansion, driven by technology, evolving consumer demands, and increasing recognition of its economic and social benefits.

feed.title: Netflix (NASDAQ:NFLX) Given New $100.00 Price Target at Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank Aktiengesellschaft has increased its price target for Netflix (NASDAQ:NFLX) to $100.00 from $98.00, maintaining a "hold" rating, despite a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating among analysts with an average target of $115.80. The report highlights significant insider selling activity, with CEO Reed Hastings and CFO Spencer Neumann offloading millions in shares. Netflix recently surpassed Q4 earnings estimates, reporting $0.56 EPS on $12.05 billion in revenue, and the stock is trading near $103.

feed.title: Bunge Global SA stock (US12185T1043): Is agribusiness resilience the key to steady returns now?
feed.summary: Bunge Global SA, an agribusiness giant, offers a stable investment opportunity through its integrated model covering grain trading, processing, and distribution. With operations spanning key global regions, Bunge provides exposure to essential food commodities, serving as a defensive play against market volatility. The company's focus on sustainability, strategic mergers, and diversification across products and geographies contributes to its potential for steady, long-term returns, appealing to investors seeking resilience in their portfolios.

feed.title: Chevron Corp. stock (US1667641005): Why does its integrated energy model matter more now for U.S. in
feed.summary: Chevron's integrated energy model, encompassing upstream, downstream, and low-carbon strategies, positions it for resilient returns amidst market volatility, making it a stable investment for U.S. investors. Its focus on high-return projects, strong shareholder returns through dividends and buybacks, and diversification across global assets provide a buffer against fluctuating oil prices and geopolitical risks. The company's competitive edge in low-cost production basins like the Permian, coupled with strategic investments in energy transition technologies, is highlighted as key to its long-term appeal despite industry challenges and market risks.

feed.title: Nucor Invites You to Join Its First Quarter of 2026 Conference Call on the Web
feed.summary: Nucor (NYSE: NUE) has announced that it will host a live conference call with its Chair and CEO, Leon Topalian, for its first quarter 2026 earnings release. The call, which will include a review of results and a Q&A session, is scheduled for April 28, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. Interested parties can access the webcast via Nucor's official website or through a dedicated event link.

feed.title: Humana members in Texas get 24/7 palliative care support June 1
feed.summary: Humana and Tuesday Health announced a partnership launching June 1, 2026, to provide value-based palliative care for eligible Humana members in Texas. This program will offer interdisciplinary teams, in-person and virtual visits, 24/7 clinical access, symptom management, and caregiver support. The collaboration aims to improve quality of life for individuals with serious illnesses and prevent unnecessary hospital visits, aligning with Humana's strategy to expand specialized care offerings through external partnerships.

feed.title: Critical capability: Combat-proven air defense
feed.summary: Raytheon, an RTX business, is significantly increasing production capacity for its Patriot air and missile defense system due to rising international demand. This surge is evidenced by two recent contracts: a $3.7 billion deal to supply Patriot GEM-T interceptors for Ukraine and a $627 million contract with the Netherlands for Patriot radars, launchers, and command-and-control stations. These agreements underscore the system's vital role in strengthening global security and defending against modern airborne threats.

feed.title: Third View Private Wealth LLC Invests $2.98M in L3Harris Technologies
feed.summary: Third View Private Wealth LLC has invested $2.98 million in L3Harris Technologies by acquiring 10,166 shares during the fourth quarter. This new stake highlights institutional interest in L3Harris, a key player in the aerospace and defense industry. The company provides a range of communications, avionics, and intelligence solutions to both government and commercial clients.

feed.title: PayPal Stock Is Down 18% in 2026. Can 14% Annual Returns Through 2028 Materialize?
feed.summary: PayPal Holdings (PYPL) stock is down 18% in 2026 due to weaker branded checkout trends, a CEO transition, and withdrawn 2027 targets. Despite these challenges, the company remains profitable with strong cash generation. A valuation model suggests PayPal stock could reach $69 per share by December 2028, implying a 14.4% annualized return, contingent on stabilizing its core business and successful product innovation.

feed.title: Amazon to Acquire Globalstar, Strike Apple Deal to Expand Satellite iPhone Connectivity
feed.summary: Amazon announced its agreement to acquire satellite operator Globalstar for approximately $11.5 billion, aiming to expand its space-based communication capabilities through its Amazon Leo network. This acquisition, coupled with a new deal with Apple Inc., will enable satellite connectivity for consumer devices like iPhones and Apple Watches, providing emergency messaging and location sharing in areas without cellular service. The move intensifies Amazon's competition with SpaceX's Starlink and positions it as a major player in the rapidly growing satellite-to-device market.

feed.title: Lennox International (NYSE:LII) Coverage Initiated at BNP Paribas Exane
feed.summary: BNP Paribas Exane initiated coverage on Lennox International (NYSE:LII) with a "neutral" rating and a $535.00 price target, suggesting a 3.34% upside. This follows Lennox missing its Q1 earnings estimates and setting FY2026 guidance, with analysts largely holding a "Hold" consensus rating on the stock. Insider selling and institutional investment adjustments were also noted.

feed.title: Barclays Adjusts Price Target on Hershey Company to $225 From $240, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Barclays has updated its price target for The Hershey Company (HSY), reducing it to $225 from the previous $240 while reiterating an Equalweight rating based on current market conditions and company outlook.

feed.title: CVS Health Corp. stock (US1266501006): Why does its pharmacy-services pivot matter more now for U.S.
feed.summary: CVS Health Corp. is reshaping its business by pivoting towards integrated pharmacy services and health insurance, aiming to be a one-stop solution for affordable healthcare. This strategy involves strong growth in its Health Services segment, expansion of primary care through clinics and virtual visits, and leveraging its Aetna acquisition for end-to-end cost control. The company also faces challenges from regulatory changes, intense competition, and execution risks, but its defensive qualities and dividend yield make it attractive for investors as a stable holding in the evolving healthcare landscape.

feed.title: News | RTX's Raytheon to deliver Patriot interceptors to Ukraine
feed.summary: Raytheon, an RTX business, has secured a $3.7 billion contract to supply Patriot GEM-T interceptors to Ukraine, significantly boosting the country's air defense capabilities. A new GEM-T production facility in Schrobenhausen, Germany, operated by COMLOG (a joint venture with MBDA Deutschland), will support this direct commercial sale and enhance supply chain resilience. This move underscores Raytheon's commitment to increasing production capacity to meet global demand and support allies.

feed.title: Micron at $420: Buy, Sell or Hold?
feed.summary: Micron Technology (MU) presents a strong bull case at $420.52 due to accelerating AI-driven memory demand and a favorable 7x forward P/E multiple. Despite significant recent gains, the company's position as the sole U.S. DRAM and NAND flash manufacturer, coupled with surging HBM orders, suggests continued growth. Investors are advised to watch Q2 FY2026 results closely to confirm the projected revenue and EPS, which would further strengthen the investment thesis.

feed.title: Investigation into Commercial Vehicle Group's Board Actions
feed.summary: Purcell & Lefkowitz LLP has launched an investigation into Commercial Vehicle Group (NASDAQ:CVGI) to determine if its board of directors breached fiduciary duties in recent corporate actions. The law firm aims to protect shareholder rights and offers free legal consultations to those affected by securities fraud and breaches of fiduciary duty, emphasizing corporate governance and transparency. This investigation follows previous news regarding executive changes at CVGI and broader market fluctuations.

feed.title: IT Investors Have Opportunity to Lead Gartner, Inc. Securities Fraud Lawsuit with the Schall Law Firm
feed.summary: The Schall Law Firm is encouraging investors of Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) who purchased securities between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, to join a class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner made false and misleading statements regarding its ability to minimize seasonality, its contract value growth potential, and the improvement in business with "tariff impacted companies," which was not true. Investors who suffered losses are urged to contact the firm before May 18, 2026.

feed.title: KFC Bucket: Amid Fast Food Slowdown, Value Meals Gain Traction
feed.summary: Amidst a fast-food slowdown and high inflation, KFC's iconic Bucket is gaining traction as budget-conscious consumers prioritize value meals. Yum! Brands, KFC's parent company, is strategically leveraging the Bucket's affordability and convenience, along with digital expansion and local adaptations, to maintain sales and customer traffic. The company faces competition but positions the Bucket as a resilient offering that can stabilize earnings in an uncertain economic climate.

feed.title: S&P Global Ratings at India's Gujarat International Finance Tec-City (GIFT City)
feed.summary: S&P Global Ratings established a presence in India's Gujarat International Finance Tec-City (GIFT City) in 2025, demonstrating its ongoing commitment to India. The firm actively engages with market participants, providing data-backed insights, contributing to industry forums, and supporting significant transactions to foster the development of India's capital markets. This initiative marks a key milestone in S&P Global Ratings' involvement in the Indian financial sector.

feed.title: Synopsys Solutions Support NASA's Artemis Program with Spacesuit Analysis and Communication System Development
feed.summary: Synopsys is collaborating with NASA's Artemis program by providing solutions for spacesuit analysis and communication system development. They are working with EMA to analyze spacesuit charging levels in the lunar environment and with Cesium and NASA Glenn Research Center to validate lunar cellular network performance using digital twin technology. These efforts aim to reduce risks for extravehicular activities and improve connectivity on the Moon for future missions.

feed.title: American Express offers customers protection from agentic purchase errors (AXP:NYSE)
feed.summary: American Express has announced extended purchase protections for its card members. These protections now cover "agentic purchases," which are made by AI agents authorized by the user. The company also introduced an agentic commerce developer kit on the same day.

feed.title: Veralto Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
feed.summary: Veralto Corporation (NYSE: VLTO) has scheduled its first quarter 2026 earnings conference call for Wednesday, April 29, 2026, at 7:30 a.m. ET. The company, a global leader in essential water and product quality solutions, will provide webcast and call-in details on its "Investors" section. Earnings news, slides, and remarks will be posted after market close on April 28, 2026.

feed.title: Cummins Announces Sponsorship of America250 to Support Nation’s 250th Anniversary Commemoration
feed.summary: Cummins Inc., a global power solutions leader, has announced its sponsorship of America250, the national nonpartisan organization leading the commemoration of the 250th anniversary of the signing of the Declaration of Independence. This partnership highlights Cummins' commitment to American progress, innovation, and community engagement, aligning with America250's mission to reflect on the nation's history and inspire future service and collaboration. Both organizations emphasize their shared values of innovation, resilience, and contributing to the next chapter of American development.

feed.title: V2 Financial group LLC Purchases 8,295 Shares of Alphabet Inc. $GOOG
feed.summary: V2 Financial group LLC significantly increased its stake in Alphabet Inc. (NASDAQ:GOOG) by 185.4% in the fourth quarter, adding 8,295 shares to hold a total of 12,769 shares valued at $4.01 million. This makes Alphabet its 8th largest holding, representing 2.0% of the fund's assets. The report also highlights recent insider selling, strong quarterly earnings that beat analyst expectations, and a declared quarterly dividend of $0.21 per share.

feed.title: Cellectis (NASDAQ:CLLS) Given Market Outperform Rating at Citizens Jmp
feed.summary: Citizens Jmp has reiterated a "Market Outperform" rating for Cellectis (NASDAQ:CLLS) with an $8.00 price target, suggesting a significant upside. This rating comes despite the biotechnology company missing EPS estimates but exceeding revenue expectations in its latest quarterly earnings. Institutional investors have notably increased their stakes, with hedge funds and institutions holding a substantial portion of the company's shares.

feed.title: NRG Energy announces secured and unsecured notes offerings
feed.summary: NRG Energy has announced offerings of both secured and unsecured notes. This likely indicates a strategy to raise capital through debt financing, diversifying its debt profile with different security levels.

feed.title: Amazon buys the satellite internet company behind Apple’s SOS system
feed.summary: Amazon is acquiring satellite internet provider Globalstar Inc., known for powering Apple's emergency SOS system, to strengthen its own Project Kuiper (Leo) satellite network. The deal will expand Leo's space-based footprint and enable direct-to-device service. Apple, which owns 20% of Globalstar, will continue its partnership with Amazon Leo for future satellite services and supported iPhone and Apple Watch models.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. 2026 Q1 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation (NYSE:JPM)
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) published its Q1 2026 earnings call presentation. This article provides access to the slide deck that accompanied the earnings call for investors and interested parties. The presentation offers detailed financial results for the quarter.

feed.title: Strategy (MSTR) Stock Rises as Bitcoin Bounces and TD Cowen Lifts Price Target
feed.summary: MicroStrategy (MSTR) stock saw a 3.1% increase after Bitcoin rose 4.6% to over $74,000, boosting other crypto-linked stocks as well. This rise follows TD Cowen upgrading its price target for MSTR to $385 from $350, maintaining a Buy rating, after MicroStrategy purchased an additional $1 billion in Bitcoin. The company now holds 766,970 Bitcoin and leverages various capital-raising programs to fund its Bitcoin acquisition strategy, differentiating itself with a hybrid model that includes its legacy analytics software business.

feed.title: Elon Musk’s Tesla Exec: Shanghai Factory Is the Key to Unlocking Robot Mass Production
feed.summary: Tesla's Shanghai Gigafactory is crucial for mass-producing the Optimus robot, with a target of 1 million robots annually and volume production of the Gen 3 Optimus by late 2026. Despite market skepticism, the success of the energy segment, which generated $3.84 billion in Q4 2025 revenue, suggests significant revenue diversification potential if the robotics goals are met. The stock is currently down 22% year-to-date, with the upcoming Q1 2026 earnings report expected to provide crucial updates on the Shanghai robotics initiative.

feed.title: New RH Credit Card from Synchrony Helps Clients Move Confidently From Vision To Fully Realized Spaces
feed.summary: RH and Synchrony have launched the RH Credit Card, a branded financing program for purchases at RH Galleries, Outlets, and RH.com. This new card integrates with the RH Members Program, offering benefits like 30% savings and exclusive design services, alongside promotional financing options. The program utilizes Synchrony's PRISM system to evaluate over 9,000 data attributes for credit decisions, aiming to provide responsible lending and streamlined application processes.

feed.title: Geminus AI, Bapco Energies, and SLB Collaborate to Deploy Physics-Native AI to Optimize Bahrain's Energy Infrastructure
feed.summary: Geminus AI, Bapco Energies, and SLB have partnered to implement physics-native artificial intelligence for real-time optimization of Bahrain's upstream energy production system. This collaboration aims to enhance energy efficiency, support digital transformation, and align with Bahrain's Net-Zero by 2060 commitment by using physics-informed AI (PiAI). The initial success involved integrating SLB's Pipesim simulator with Bapco's operational data, allowing for rapid "what-if" scenario analysis and system-wide optimization across thousands of wells and pipelines.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of PayPal Holdings, Inc. Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against PayPal Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: PYPL) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between February 25, 2025, and February 2, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that PayPal misrepresented its revenue outlook and growth during this period, failing to account for macroeconomic factors and operational issues. Investors have until April 20, 2026, to file a lead plaintiff motion.

feed.title: More than 7,000 Wilton homes and businesses gain multi-g internet
feed.summary: Comcast's Xfinity has expanded its multi-gigabit, symmetrical internet services to over 7,000 homes and businesses in Wilton, Connecticut. This expansion is part of a broader investment in Fairfield County, offering a full suite of residential and business services including high-speed internet, mobile, entertainment, and smart home solutions. Additionally, Comcast is committed to community initiatives like Internet Essentials, which provides low-cost internet to eligible households.

feed.title: Portnoy Law Firm Announces Class Action on Behalf of Apollo Global Management, Inc. Investors
feed.summary: The Portnoy Law Firm has announced a class action lawsuit against Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO) on behalf of investors who purchased securities between May 10, 2021, and February 21, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that Apollo Global's CEO Marc Rowan and former CEO Leon Black communicated with Jeffrey Epstein regarding the firm's business, contradicting the company's claims of no business ties with Epstein. This alleged entanglement led to significant declines in Apollo Global's stock price following reports in The Financial Times and CNN.

feed.title: Nucor CEO Leon Topalian to review Q1 results on April 28 webcast
feed.summary: Nucor (NYSE: NUE) announced it will host a live webcast of its first quarter 2026 conference call on April 28, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. CEO Leon Topalian will lead the call, reviewing the company's results for the quarter ended April 4, 2026, followed by a question-and-answer session. The archived call will be available on Nucor's website for those unable to attend the live webcast.

feed.title: CWH Shareholder Alert: Camping World Holdings, Inc. Securities Class Action Lawsuit Investors With Losses May Join -- The Gross Law Firm
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for Camping World Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CWH) investors who incurred losses during the period of April 29, 2025, to February 24, 2026. The lawsuit alleges that the company made materially false or misleading statements regarding its inventory management, consumer demand, and financial disclosures. Shareholders are encouraged to contact the firm to discuss lead plaintiff appointment, with a deadline of May 11, 2026.

feed.title: APO Shareholder Alert: Investors With Losses May Seek to Lead the Class Action in Apollo Global management, Inc. Securities Lawsuit -- The Gross Law Firm
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for investors in Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO), encouraging those who suffered losses during the class period of May 10, 2021, to February 21, 2026, to contact the firm regarding a potential lead plaintiff appointment. The lawsuit alleges that Apollo Global made false and misleading statements by denying business dealings with Jeffrey Epstein, despite frequent communications between Apollo leaders and Epstein in the 2010s. The deadline to register and seek lead plaintiff status is May 1, 2026.

feed.title: 100 schools in 17 states get Casey’s classroom grants
feed.summary: Casey's has awarded over $1.3 million in Cash for Classrooms grants to 100 K-12 public and nonprofit private schools across 17 states. These grants, maxing out at $50,000 each, support physical improvements, material needs, teacher assistance, and community engagement. Since its inception in 2020, the program has distributed $6.2 million in total, significantly funded by guest donations, Coca-Cola, and Casey's contributions.

feed.title: Casey’s Awards More Than $1.3 Million in Cash for Classrooms Grants
feed.summary: Casey's has awarded over $1.3 million in Cash for Classrooms grants to 100 K-12 public and nonprofit private schools across 17 states. These grants, part of a program that has distributed $6.2 million since 2020, support physical improvements, material needs, teacher assistance, and community engagement. Funding this year came from guest donations, Coca-Cola, and Casey's, aiming to strengthen schools and communities.

feed.title: Cohen & Steers revamps U.S. wealth team, adds new sales chief
feed.summary: Cohen & Steers (NYSE:CNS) has announced significant leadership appointments and organizational enhancements within its U.S. wealth division. Brad Ispass has been promoted to Head of U.S. Wealth, overseeing distribution strategy across four new segments, while Paul Bernardi joins as Head of U.S. Wealth Sales to lead an integrated sales group. These changes aim to strengthen distribution capabilities, support continued growth, and build upon seven consecutive quarters of positive net inflows in wealth.

feed.title: IT Shareholder Alert: May 18, 2026 Lead Plaintiff Deadline in Gartner, Inc. Securities Class Action Lawsuit -- The Gross Law Firm
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for Gartner, Inc. (NYSE: IT) investors, announcing a lead plaintiff deadline of May 18, 2026, in a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Gartner made false and misleading statements about its growth rates and ability to meet consulting revenue targets and maintain expected contract value (CV) growth rates. Shareholders who purchased IT shares between February 4, 2025, and February 2, 2026, are encouraged to contact the firm regarding their potential role as lead plaintiff, following significant stock price declines after negative earnings announcements.

feed.title: Evergy to Conduct 2026 Shareholders Meeting Online
feed.summary: Evergy, Inc. (NASDAQ: EVRG) will hold its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders virtually on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern time. Shareholders can access the meeting online to elect 12 Board of Directors members and address other business matters identified in the meeting's notice. The company serves 1.7 million customers in Kansas and Missouri, focusing on providing affordable, reliable, and sustainable energy.

feed.title: ENPH Shareholder Alert: Enphase Energy, Inc. Securities Class Action Lawsuit Investors With Losses May Join — The Gross Law Firm
feed.summary: The Gross Law Firm has issued a shareholder alert for investors of Enphase Energy, Inc. (NASDAQ: ENPH) regarding a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit alleges that Enphase made materially false and misleading statements about its ability to manage channel inventory, mitigate effects of the 25D Credit termination, and overstated its financial and operational prospects during the class period of April 22, 2025, to October 28, 2025. Shareholders who incurred losses are encouraged to contact the firm by the April 20, 2026, deadline to seek lead plaintiff appointment.
